title: archivist.jar
body:
# THIS MOD REQUIRES OCULUS AND GECKOLIB.

## STABLE VERSION RELEASING IN JUNE. UPDATES:
###
https://discord.gg/T2BtRewWk7

```
our last sunrise waited for no one
```

please start in a new world after a new update.
1.  MULTIPLAYER COMPATIBLE. easier n more enjoyable like that ngl.
  2. DONT USE SHADERS. mod comes with shaders pre-installed, DONT install more. you can toggle that off though
3.  DONT USE RESOURCEPACKS. (you will break something)   

**this mod consists of 12 DIMENSIONS, OVER 10 ENTITIES, AND LOTS OF EVENTS**

it can: install resources, check game data, display applications, use powershell, create temp files, display errors, notifications, have loud noises, and know your past, present and future. NO SENSITIVE PERSONAL INFO IS SHOWN ON SCREEN.

if u encounter any bug, need help w anything, contact me in the discord server above!

not allowed to modify under any circumstances.
